step_by_step_thinking: Supplementary retention on the abutment tooth is mainly influenced by factors related to correct crown adaptation, which includes proper cementation techniques and careful contouring of the crown margins to match the natural contours of the marginal gingiva. These steps enhance the stability and longevity of the crown by optimizing the interaction between the crown and the surrounding anatomical features of the tooth. Therefore, the best option would be B: Proper cementation technique.
raw_response:
Supplementary retention on the abutment tooth is mainly influenced by factors related to correct crown adaptation, which includes proper cementation techniques and careful contouring of the crown margins to match the natural contours of the marginal gingiva. These steps enhance the stability and longevity of the crown by optimizing the interaction between the crown and the surrounding anatomical features of the tooth. Therefore, the best option would be B: Proper cementation technique.
\boxed{B}
